queries.question: Which jazz musicians have been in the industry for 10 years and which rock guitarists have been in the industry for the same duration?
queries.sql:
SELECT MusicPerformer.Name 
FROM MusicPerformer
WHERE (MusicPerformer.MusicPerformerType = "Jazz Musician" OR MusicPerformer.MusicPerformerType = "Rock Guitarist") AND MusicPerformer.YearsInIndustry = 10
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?musicperformer a :MusicPerformer .
  ?musicperformer p:name ?name .
  ?musicperformer p:MusicPerformerType ?musicperformertype_w .
  ?musicperformer p:MusicPerformerType ?musicperformertype_w2 .
  ?musicperformer p:YearsInIndustry ?yearsinindustry_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?musicperformertype_w) = "Jazz Musician" || STR(?musicperformertype_w2) = "Rock Guitarist")) && (STR(?yearsinindustry_w) = "10" || STR(?yearsinindustry_w) = "10.0")))
}

queries.question: Display jazz musicians and rock guitarists who have been in the industry for 10 years.
queries.sql:
SELECT MusicPerformer.Name 
FROM MusicPerformer
WHERE MusicPerformer.MusicPerformerType = "Jazz Musician" OR MusicPerformer.MusicPerformerType = "Rock Guitarist" AND MusicPerformer.YearsInIndustry = 10
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?musicperformer a :MusicPerformer .
  ?musicperformer p:name ?name .
  ?musicperformer p:MusicPerformerType ?musicperformertype_w .
  ?musicperformer p:MusicPerformerType ?musicperformertype_w2 .
  ?musicperformer p:YearsInIndustry ?yearsinindustry_w .
  FILTER((STR(?musicperformertype_w) = "Jazz Musician" || (STR(?musicperformertype_w2) = "Rock Guitarist" && (STR(?yearsinindustry_w) = "10" || STR(?yearsinindustry_w) = "10.0"))))
}
